Author: Sebastian Preisner
Message:
fix(talos-upgrade): direct /talosctl cmd, scratch image has no shell

talosctl image (ghcr.io/siderolabs/talosctl) is scratch-based — no
/bin/sh. Previous command used /bin/sh -ec which always failed with
Init:Error/StartError.

Switch to direct /talosctl with individual args. K8s expands
 natively in container args,
no shell needed.

Author: Sebastian Preisner
Message:
fix(remediation-api): init container for pip install, PodSecurity fixes

- use init container for pip install (1Gi mem limit)
- share installed packages via emptyDir
- fix PodSecurity violations (non-root, drop caps)
- sync SOPS secret value with live cluster

Author: Sebastian Preisner
Message:
feat(remediation-api): Phase D - auto-remediation service

- Python FastAPI service in ai-ops namespace
- Bearer token auth (shared HMAC secret)
- Allowed actions: delete-pod, rollout-restart, get-pods
- Allowed namespaces: monitoring, ai-ops
- Audit via ntfy
- ConfigMap-based code, no image registry needed
- SOPS-encrypted shared secret
- n8n gets REMEDIATION_API_URL + REMEDIATION_API_KEY

Author: Sebastian Preisner
Message:
fix(searxng): set server.secret_key in settings ConfigMap

Init-container awk never matched the server block; SearXNG kept the default
ultrasecretkey and crashed. Mount settings directly from ConfigMap.

Author: Sebastian Preisner
Message:
fix: use HelmRepository with OCI type for F5 NIC chart

OCIRepository CRD is not supported by helm-controller as sourceRef.
Using HelmRepository with type: oci and oci:// URL instead.
